title: pavonia peruviana
intro: Pavonia peruviana, also known as the Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pavonia peruviana include its potential in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
